title: Dijon, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dijon, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dijon is a city in Bourgogne-Franche-Comté with a population of 155,000. The capital of Burgundy, famous for its mustard, wine, and a beautifully preserved historic center with half-timbered houses.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
